question: Which statement about night reading preference is most accurate?

options.A: Around one-third of people in county Z prefer reading at night.
options.B: Night and morning preferences are about the same.
options.C: More than half of people in county Z prefer reading at night.
options.D: Fewer than one-third of people in county Z prefer reading at night.

explanation: The Night slice is 40%, which is less than half. The misleading angle encourages choosing that more than half prefer night, but the majority is actually the Morning slice (60%).
